name: fheskills
description: The missing knowledge between AI agents and production encrypted smart contracts. FHE on Ethereum — encrypted types, ACL, patterns, security, deployment.

skills.name: ship
skills.description: End-to-end guide from idea to deployed encrypted dApp

skills.name: concepts
skills.description: Mental models for FHE — nothing is plaintext, you cannot branch on secrets

skills.name: fhevm
skills.description: Core library — encrypted types, FHE operations, type casting

skills.name: acl
skills.description: Access Control Lists for encrypted values — the #1 source of bugs

skills.name: patterns
skills.description: Confidential ERC-20, encrypted voting, sealed-bid auctions

skills.name: testing
skills.description: Testing encrypted contracts with Hardhat and fhEVM plugin

skills.name: security
skills.description: FHE-specific vulnerabilities — ACL misconfig, information leaks, trivial encryption

skills.name: addresses
skills.description: Verified fhEVM contract addresses for mainnet and Sepolia

skills.name: tools
skills.description: fhEVM development toolchain — Hardhat plugin, Solidity library

skills.name: frontend
skills.description: Handling encrypted state in your dApp UI

skills.name: deployment
skills.description: Deploying encrypted contracts to fhEVM-compatible chains

skills.name: migration
skills.description: Converting existing Solidity contracts to use FHE
